name: example-skills
description: Public test marketplace of sample plugins for the Agentry plugin. Each plugin demonstrates one component type from the agent-plugins spec.

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Skill that reviews a diff for bugs, security issues, and style violations.

plugins.name: pr-summarizer
plugins.description: Slash commands (/pr-summarize, /pr-checklist) that turn a diff into a PR body and review checklist.

plugins.name: commit-message-writer
plugins.description: Single-skill-at-root plugin plus a PreToolUse/PostToolUse hook pair that validates and logs git commits.

plugins.name: repo-toolkit
plugins.description: Subagent (repo-explorer) and a bundled local MCP server that exposes git metadata as tools.

plugins.name: api-doc-generator
plugins.description: Experimental skill that drafts API reference documentation from source code annotations and route handlers.
